prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Conductor selection & sizing, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: undersized for load + length (voltage drop). The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: NEC 310, Table 310.16.
title: Tool and material selection: Conductor selection & sizing (commercial project)
